package_probes.purpose: standard Ecker/Sinz lab neural predictor models
model/dataloader factory used by official examples
metadata/backend dependency used by the ecosystem
training loop dependency used by many baselines

recommended_action: Use the tracked compact PyTorch MLP as the local NN control, while stating explicitly that it is not an official/SOTA Sensorium model.
interpretation: Official Sensorium baselines are the preferred external control, but they are only acceptable for this project when the environment can run them reproducibly. Otherwise the local MLP remains a neural-network control rather than a SOTA claim.
